supersedes_baseline: BEM-009 schema_version 3 (release_status model expanded per GPT audit BEM-009A item 4)

definition_of_working_management_contour.purpose: Explicit, non-derived statement of what counts as a working control contour, per GPT audit BEM-009A item 9.
necessary_and_sufficient_conditions: 1. An operator message via Telegram reaches an executing agent within a bounded time, end to end, with a runtime-proven receipt (currently satisfied: Telegram->Worker->claude.yml).

2. Every dispatch event reaches COMPLETED + STATE_COMMITTED per dispatch_lifecycle_state_machine.json before being reported as successful to the operator (currently NOT satisfied: no START_CONFIRMED polling exists yet).

3. Every change to architectural state is logged as a valid SSOT transaction with receipt_ref and pre/post hash (currently NOT satisfied: ssot_transaction_log.jsonl does not yet exist as enforced practice).
4. No two SSOT files claim authority over the same fact without conflict resolution per ssot_precedence_order.json (currently satisfied as a RULE; not yet stress-tested against a real conflict).
5. Paid/metered API calls are structurally blocked, not just policy-documented (currently satisfied: cost policy guard in provider-router.yml, RELEASE_CLEARED).
6. Every governance rule has a known enforcement_type in rule_enforcement_matrix.json; none remain 'unknown' (currently NOT satisfied: RULE-004..010 unresolved).
7. Archival of any file requires a PASS row in archive_candidate_report.json (currently satisfied as a RULE; first real archival pass not yet executed).
8. AGENT_CONTEXT.md and all human-readable canon snapshots are mechanically regenerated from SSOT, never hand-edited (currently NOT satisfied: no regeneration pipeline exists yet).
definition_of_working_management_contour.current_assessment: 4 of 8 conditions structurally satisfied as rules; 4 of 8 still require implementation. This protocol (BEM-010) defines the rules; it does not yet claim they are all enforced in running code.

definitions.RELEASE_BLOCKING: Actively prevents Broad Release PASS; must be resolved before P7 can pass
definitions.RELEASE_LIMITED: Implemented and working but with a known, accepted, permanent scope restriction (e.g. P3 all-role E2E limited scope) — does not block release but must be disclosed in every audit package
definitions.RELEASE_NEUTRAL: Wired and partially proven; does not currently block release but is not yet fully verified either
definitions.RELEASE_UNKNOWN: Status genuinely not established by available evidence — distinct from RELEASE_NEUTRAL, which implies partial evidence exists
definitions.RELEASE_CLEARED: Fully implemented, runtime-proven, receipt-backed; no known gap

ssot_update_protocol.who_may_update: Curator-Executor role only, as part of a task-closure event
ssot_update_protocol.when_updated: Atomically with the closing receipt, per governance/state/ssot_transaction_protocol.json
ssot_update_protocol.invalid_update_definition: Any edit without a corresponding governance/state/ssot_transaction_log.jsonl entry is INVALID per ssot_transaction_protocol.json
ssot_update_protocol.precedence_note: See governance/state/ssot_precedence_order.json for full conflict resolution and domain separation rules
ssot_update_protocol.derived_documents_rule: AGENT_CONTEXT.md and all canon .docx snapshots are regenerated FROM this file — never edited first

rows.planned: Operator message reaches an executing agent reliably and quickly
rows.actual: Telegram -> Cloudflare Worker -> claude.yml proven live (BEM-947)

rows.planned: object_runner -> dispatch_consumer -> curator_router -> dispatch_executor with honest planned/dispatched/executed states
rows.actual: All components exist as real code. dispatch_executor.py repaired after NameError bug (BEM-948)
rows.remaining_gap: No START_CONFIRMED polling implemented per dispatch_lifecycle_state_machine.json — stops logging at DISPATCHED, not COMPLETED+STATE_COMMITTED

rows.planned: Single universal queue-driven dispatcher, evidence unified with governance-chain trail
rows.actual: roadmap-autopilot.yml exists, functional, direct curl dispatch
rows.remaining_gap: Does not write to dispatch_executed.jsonl. Same START_CONFIRMED gap as governance chain. Operational Contract for Dispatch not yet implemented in code (only specified in BEM-010 state machine)

rows.planned: prompt_assembler.py composes static+dynamic prompt per element_prompt_profiles.json + rule_registry.json
rows.actual: prompt_assembler.py real implementation. element_prompt_profiles.json 10 profiles. rule_registry.json has all 3 COUNCIL rules
rows.remaining_gap: No runtime trace proving *_stage_runner.py calls assembler (confirmed UNRESOLVED in BEM-010 migration check fragment 2.2-2.4). 5.4 comparative baseline test also UNRESOLVED.

rows.planned: Primary=Claude Code Action, honest mechanical fallback, paid OpenAI permanently prohibited
rows.actual: provider_config.json v1.5, cost policy guard in provider-router.yml, invalid workflows archived
rows.remaining_gap: provider_router.py TTL-scoped stale-error-check (fragment 1.B) and the 3 pre-flight tests (fragment 1.C2) UNRESOLVED per BEM-010 migration check — not re-verified after BEM-950

rows.planned: Governance rules enforced by runtime code, not just documented
rows.actual: RULE-011/012 verified. Full matrix lives in rule_enforcement_matrix.json
rows.remaining_gap: RULE-004..010 enforcement_type still 'unknown' for the group entry — condition 6 of Definition of Working Management Contour NOT satisfied

rows.planned: 8-stage roadmap P0.5->P7 to reach a working, evidence-backed control contour
rows.actual: 6/8 DONE. P7 receipt exists, status BLOCKED
rows.remaining_gap: P1 blocked, P1-ALT attempt 1/3 failed, P2/P3 receipts not clean PASS

rows.planned: Active workspace contains only canonical, currently-relevant files
rows.actual: Hundreds of diagnostic files remain active
rows.remaining_gap: Archival blocked by archive_candidate_report.json: live-tree grep (step 1 of dry-run procedure) not yet executed — requires CI checkout access

rows.planned: Derived briefing artifact, regenerated from SSOT, never hand-edited
rows.remaining_gap: Regeneration pipeline not implemented for ANY derived document, not just AGENT_CONTEXT.md (BEM-010 task DOC-1)

rows.planned: Every SSOT write is a logged, hashed, receipt-linked transaction
rows.actual: Protocol defined (ssot_transaction_protocol.json); NOT yet enforced — this very protocol's own writes were not logged via the new mechanism, since it did not exist until this commit
rows.remaining_gap: No enforcement guard exists yet to reject un-logged SSOT writes. Bootstrap gap: cannot retroactively log the writes that created the protocol itself.
Neither dispatch mechanism implements START_CONFIRMED polling. This is the single largest functional gap surfaced by BEM-010.
